reviews.review_title: It's a shame this is unlisted
reviews.review_description: The immersive version is mid.

Free TV is great, especially when I've used this app elsewhere before (anybody else remember the PS3 client?). This app is by NO MEANS a good way to watch it though. The stream shouldn't stutter and stop, and when I went to the troubleshooting section of their website, there was no section made readily available for dealing with streaming issues on the Quest. Uninstaller this monstrosity and holding out hope the Immersive Beta is better than this.
Very good app
Recommended for Media. One of my personal favourites for TV. Its a must have for all round media content

Been a problem for months.Obviously this Pluto  VR Quest  1.0 version isn't a priority fix..
Audio turns into Darth Vader.
Not great..or even mediocre
I don’t know what y’all are complaining bout the only problem with it is the 3d

See a lot of reviews about the App not working, seems to be its not supported in the EU (or at least most EU countries). App works completely fine in US or over US VPN.
FWIW :)
Unable to even start the app

reviews.review_title: Useless link to a website pictogram app.
reviews.review_description:
Nu clue what it is but it advertise with movies on the quest mainpage, then you need to download a app, but that app is just a link to a webpage, so the quest browser opens and you get send to a page. And then you can click whatever but nothing realy interesting happens.
No sympathy for apps like this, just reported it for spam. And shame on Meta for not letting us remove this app icon.
Not possible to watch anything properly as the sound consistantly messes up and you cannot understand anything. Sounds like its been slowed down.
This app does not work on quest 3. The video never starts whether it is live tv or on demand. I wonder if it was ever tested on Quest 3.
Sounds goes all weird after 10-15 minutes of using the app. Annoying and makes the app useless on quest 3.
Won’t play sound stuck on mute can’t get it to unmute
For the most part I like this app but there is an option for 3D but it doesn't work right with the Quest platform.  So why is there a screen option for it then?
Say it will not work on this platform!!!
Doesn’t work on live tv or on demand.  I have super fast internet, so that is not the problem

I stream content via the Pluto app on my TV. They offer a wide range of free content. Having the ability to watch these live and on demand programs on my Quest 2 is awesome. I find the Quest 2 app works great. I have had zero issues and am really pleased Pluto offers this option.
Please fix the on demand, not running any of my selections, and also have where you don't have to start the app with watching something! I feel like that is what's breaking it. Fix it please
Love this ap

UI elements end up difficult to interact with, navigation feels unnatural, and many other problems that stem from this being a lazy web app. Side loading the android apk provides a superior experience.
Don't bother Aussies. It doesn't work.
Every channel has glitched audio after 10-15 minutes or so.  Sounds robotic and unintelligible.  App is therefore useless.  Developer has no response or solution.  Uninstalled.
As many have said, audio becomes robotic and unintelligible after a commercial break. When will this be fixed???
This app is literally just a web browser locked with a custom URL.

As others have stated, I have also had some audio issues. Sometimes the audio works fine. Sometimes it gets slowed down more than  a DJ screww mixtape. But not gonna kill this app and give it one star I’m sure this is something that will be fixed with updates. It’s a free app. It does work for the most part and I don’t have sound issues all the time but this may be very . The fact that Meta and Pluto 
are trying to give us free entertainment though not perfect right now I think is awesome. That being said if the issue isn’t fixed by the end of the year, I’m going to feel differently. If it gets fixed within an update 5stars if it doesn’t 2 stars. And I’m running it on a quest 3so it can work on a 3.
Please buy this app immediately!
Good

reviews.review_title: Audio slows down after a few minutes
reviews.review_description: Totally unusable after 5 minutes because the audio destroys itself

Loading the app is okay, but after a few minutes, the sound just goes nuts. One second, it’s reasonably clear, the next buzzing sound. Really annoying. At that point there was nothing to do but shut down the app. After trying 3 times to watch just one movie with this app, I said its gone. Finally uninstalled this electronic real estate taken up my space. Should have known not to 
embarrass myself trying to share a movie with my friends. Thanks to the developers, you really made a mess.
Always ha my favorite classics, highly recommended and best part is its free! I have it on every tv and phone and iPad! Totally 5 stars
It’s not great but not terrible.
Every couple of minutes or less the sound slows down and everyone has a deep vouce but video runs at normal speed. Almost unusable.

I can watch 4 ads to see an on demand movie. No big deal. But I then fast forward a bit and 4-5 more ads. Then I fast forward a bit more and what do you know…. More ads. I watched 10 seconds of movie for 12-15 ads. Hopefully this gets fixed.
Won't work on the quest 3

reviews.review_title: Everything in Pluto TV is fine Not Audio
reviews.review_description: Pluto TV Audio is sounded bad if you change each channels you might not hear it but it sound like headphones been in the water way too long
I love that I can always count on Pluto to provide good entertainment on so many  platforms.
